name: SBLHACKER-MD
description: WhatsApp Bot made by SBLHACKER | NO SESSION ID NEEDED! Sirf number dalo aur code aayo

MODE.description: Set Mode to 'public' to work in all chats only, 'inbox' to work in pm(inbox) chats only or 'private' to work for you only. Default is 'public'.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Put only one Owner Number Here ie 92xxxxx

ANTI_DELETE.description: Can be set to 'inboxonly' to recover for personal chats only, 'chatsonly' to recover for groups and personal chats only or 'true' to recover all chats and status updates.

SUDO_NUMBERS.description: Put Sudo Numbers separated by comma Here ie 92xxxx,92xxxxx,92xxxxx.

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: Make it 'true' if you want bot to view statuses.

AUTO_LIKE_STATUS.description: Make it 'true' if you want bot to read and like statuses.

STATUS_REPLY_MSG.description: Set your status reply message to be sent after bot views status

ANTICALL_MSG.value: *_📞 Auto Call Reject Mode Activated by SBLHACKER-MD. Join: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VbBVDAc1noz5dhxnYO3r_*
